prompt: [Men's Version Prompt] Based on the front-facing photo I uploaded, generate a professional men's studio business portrait. Please strictly preserve the authentic identity features of the person in the photo, including face shape, facial feature proportions, eyebrow and eye structure, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, perceived age, facial texture, hairline, and hairstyle. Do not turn the person into someone else, do not over-rejuvenate, do not over-smooth the skin, and do not generate a fake AI face. The final result must look like a high-quality professional portrait of the same individual. The visual style should refer to high-end corporate executive headshots, LinkedIn business portraits, and management photos on official company websites. The person faces the camera, using a classic head-and-shoulders portrait composition, capturing from the chest to the head. The posture is natural and upright, with shoulders relaxed but conveying a sense of power. Eyes look directly into the camera, with a confident, steady, and approachable expression featuring a restrained smile, presenting a professional, reliable, and authoritative aura. Please replace the clothing with a well-tailored dark gray textured suit, a crisp white shirt inside, and a high-quality navy blue tie. The suit should be well-fitting, smooth, with a business texture; the collar, shoulder lines, and tie knot should be clear and natural. Avoid exaggerated luxury or looking like wedding or studio art photos. Use soft, flattering professional studio lighting. The main light shines from the front-side, creating natural light and shadow levels on the face, with slight catchlights in the eyes and realistic skin texture. The overall look is clean and high-end. Avoid harsh hard light, overexposure, greasy reflections, and heavy shadows. The background is a smooth, blurred gradient from medium gray to warm taupe, simple, clean, without clutter, text, or logos. The background is only used to set off the subject and should not distract. Photo requirements: realistic photographic feel, commercial portrait photography, high resolution, clear details, natural skin tone, high-end texture, stable composition, subject centered, coordinated head-to-shoulder ratio. Aspect ratio 3:4. [Women's Version Prompt] Based on the front-facing photo I uploaded, generate a professional women's studio business portrait.
